proven.claim: PROVEN: fileCoverage in [0, 100] for every file entry
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P7
; LINE: 450
; PROVEN: fileCoverage in [0, 100] for every file entry
(declare-const signals Int)
(declare-const unverified Int)
(declare-const numerator Int)
; Code transition: signals >= 1 — every contract adds 1 to entry.signals
; entries only exist because at least one contract mapped to this file
(assert (>= signals 1))
; Code transition: 0 <= unverified <= signals (boolean increment, once per contract)
(assert (>= unverified 0))
(assert (<= unverified signals))
; Code transition: numerator = signals - unverified
(assert (= numerator (- signals unverified)))
; Negated property: numerator < 0 (would produce negative fileCoverage)
(assert (< numerator 0))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: VIOLATION: variable relPath is labelled "relative" but is an absolute (possibly truncated) path
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 450
; VIOLATION: variable relPath is labelled "relative" but is an absolute (possibly truncated) path
; runReport's call list: entries, exit, get, getAll, log, padEnd, resolveProjectRoot, round, set, slice, sort
; The function relative() is NOT in the call list — it is never invoked in runReport
; Compare: runExplain calls relative(projectRoot, filePath) to produce a true relative path
(declare-const file_is_absolute Int)    ; 1 = c.file starts with / (pipeline uses resolve())
(declare-const relative_fn_called Int)  ; 1 = relative() was called
(declare-const relpath_is_relative Int) ; 1 = displayed path is relative to projectRoot
; Code transition: c.file stores absolute paths (ContractStore pipeline uses resolve())
(assert (= file_is_absolute 1))
; Code transition: relative() absent from runReport call list — never called
(assert (= relative_fn_called 0))
; Code transition: slice(-57) and "..." prefix preserve the absolute nature of the path
; without relative(), relPath remains absolute
(assert (=> (= relative_fn_called 0) (= relpath_is_relative 0)))
; Violation: relPath is not actually relative to projectRoot
(assert (= relpath_is_relative 0))
(assert (= file_is_absolute 1))
(check-sat)
